title: Ubiquiti UVC-G5-Dome - UniFi Video Camera G5 Dome, 3 pack
description: UniFi Protect G5 Dome camera features a 5MP sensor (2688 x 1512px) at 24fps, a fixed lens (approximately 2.8mm), IR illumination up to 10m for night vision, a built-in microphone and speaker. The camera has a very robust metal body, with IK08 vandal resistance and IPX4 weather resistance against splashing water. It connects to the network via a 10/100 Mbps Ethernet port, which supports power over cable - 802.3af PoE (37 - 57V DC) 5MP, 30 FPS Video Night mode with IR LEDs up to 10m Wide field of view, 102.4° viewing angle IPX4 weather-resistant housing Built-in microphone and speaker Power over PoE, max power consumption 5W Enhanced colors with HDR (High Dynamic Range) Managed by UniFi Protect software - from version 2.2.7, 2.7.18 (web), or 1.10.0 (mobile app) Vandal resistance - IK08 Note: To fully utilize this product, UniFi Protect is required. It is recommended to use it with UniFi Dream Machine Pro or UniFi Protect Network Video Recorder Device Screws + wall plugs Plasticic holder for wall mounting
